title: thymus serpyllum subsp. willkommii
intro: Thymus serpyllum subsp. willkommii, commonly known as wild thyme or creeping thyme, is a low-growing, flowering herbaceous perennial plant native to Europe and Asia. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include its antimicrobial, antifungal, and anti-inflammatory properties, making it a popular ingredient in traditional medicine. The health benefits of Thymus serpyllum subsp. willkommii include its ability to boost the immune system, reduce stress and anxiety, and exhibit antioxidant properties, potentially reducing the risk of chronic diseases. Herbal preparations of Thymus serpyllum subsp. willkommii include teas, essential oils, and infusions, which can be used to promote relaxation, improve respiratory health, and support digestive well-being.
